description_long: This is a rectangular white ceramic plate featuring a full meal arrangement. At the center is a dome-shaped serving of white rice with visible vegetable bits, surrounded by a portion of green curry or sauce with leafy greens, a piece of toasted bread, a scoop of mashed potatoes, a colorful slaw of purple cabbage and carrots, and a medley of steamed vegetables. The plate is set on a flat, black-bordered tray, enhancing its presentation. The food items are neatly separated, each occupying a distinct section of the plate. The surface of the plate is glossy, and the food appears fresh and well-prepared. No visible markings or inscriptions are present on the plate.
description: A rectangular white ceramic plate with rice, green curry, bread, mashed potatoes, slaw, and mixed vegetables, all neatly arranged on a black-bordered tray. The plate has a glossy finish and a clean, organized presentation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rice mound at the center, green curry with leafy greens in front, bread to the left, mashed potatoes and slaw to the right, and mixed vegetables at the back.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the green curry and rice, with the bread and vegetables more visible on the left, and the slaw and mashed potatoes on the right.
description_view_2: From the back, the rice is central with mashed potatoes and slaw to the left, bread at the top right, and vegetables at the bottom right.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the bread and green curry in the foreground, with rice, vegetables, mashed potatoes, and slaw arrayed behind.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is presented on a black-bordered tray, suggesting placement on a table or serving surface.
